ul.li: Memory Growth: Continuous array of chars.
Data Type: All fields are char[] arrays.

g.text: UTS Namespace struct new_utsname Memory Layout
Linux Kernel include/uapi/linux/utsname.h | Total Size: 390 Bytes

div.p: The Linux constant __NEW_UTS_LEN is 64. Including the \0 terminator, each field is 65 bytes. This misaligns with the standard 64-byte L1 Cache Line, ensuring that every string access likely results in a cache line split (spanning two lines).
